title: Respawn – GSAP-Powered Gaming Store UI Concept
description: A front-end visual experience project focused on creating a gaming shop interface using React and GSAP. Built purely for learning advanced animations and smooth transitions, this project emphasizes interactive UI design rather than backend functionality.

title: Pixcribe – AI Text-to-Image Generator
description: A full-stack web application that converts text prompts into AI-generated images. Built with React for a dynamic frontend and Node.js with Express for backend processing, the app uses MongoDB for data storage and integrates Razorpay for handling payments or credits. Designed to explore AI-based content generation with a smooth user experience.

title: Wizard – GSAP Marketing Experience
description: A front-end visual experience project focused on creating an engaging marketing interface using HTML, CSS, and GSAP. Built to explore smooth animations, scroll-based interactions, and modern UI storytelling without any backend functionality.
